subcodes.first_line: O thou lion-hearted soul, even as a lion roar, that thy roaring may perchance to the seventh heaven soar!
subcodes.first_line_orig: غره کن شیروار ای شیر حق تا رود آن غره تا هفتم طبق فسبحان من تقدست ذاته من ان
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation
